impact: This improves autonomous progress by giving the PP&D daemon deterministic recovery rules: run py_compile before broad tests, preserve probe-required constants, avoid dataclasses in syntax-probed modules loaded outside sys.modules, and split contract implementation from fixture tests when recent failures are import or SyntaxError related.
summary: Add a narrow supervisor repair guide that tells the daemon how to recover from the blocked missing-information validator and current source-freshness retry without repeating the same syntax/import failures.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 1 task(s) are blocked: Task checkbox-59: Add the missing-information output validator in the smallest possible Python module after the import test and four-item fixture pass, proving source backing, deduplication, action classification, and private-value rejection.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
